title: Plurality Voting
description: Standard single-choice voting. Users select one option from a list of candidates or choices in an election.

title: Ranked Choice Voting
description: Users rank multiple options in order of preference. The platform processes ranked ballots to determine the winner using elimination rounds.

title: Approval Voting
description: Users approve one or more options simultaneously. All approved options receive a vote, enabling nuanced preference expression.

title: Plus/Minus Voting
description: Sentiment-based voting where users assign positive (+) or negative (−) scores to each option. A statistical significance panel displays real-time confidence levels.

title: MCQ Pre-Voting Quiz
description: Users answer a multiple-choice quiz before their vote is cast. Correct answers may influence VP rewards or unlock voting access. Designed to promote informed participation.

title: MCQ Image Voting
description: Visual voting interface where each election option is represented by an image. Users vote by selecting their preferred image option.

title: Prediction Pool Voting
description: Users wager VP on the predicted outcome of an election. The VP pool is distributed among correct predictors after the election closes.

title: Collaborative Voting Room
description: Real-time group voting environment where multiple users vote simultaneously. Includes live discussion threads, participant emoji reactions, and real-time result streaming. Used for group decision-making sessions.

title: Location-Based Voting
description: Geo-targeted elections appear for users based on their detected geographic location. Enables regional, city-level, or neighbourhood-specific elections.

title: External Voter Gate
description: Allows non-registered users to participate in specific elections via a shared link. Captures partial participation data and prompts registration post-vote.

title: Cryptographic Vote Receipts
status_hint: ⚠️ Partial (cryptographic verification exists, but SHA-256 + RSA receipt spec is not fully confirmed end-to-end)
description: Every vote generates a unique SHA-256 + RSA cryptographic receipt. Users can use this receipt to verify their vote was counted correctly without revealing how they voted.

title: Vote Anonymity via Mixnet
status_hint: ❌ Not implemented/verified (mixnets/ZK-style privacy routing not wired in current Web implementation)
description: All votes pass through an onion-routing mixnet system that removes the link between voter identity and vote content. Mixing cycles run on a configurable schedule.

title: Zero-Knowledge Proofs (ZK-SNARKs)
status_hint: ❌ Not implemented/verified (ZK proofs not wired in current Web implementation)
description: Allows the platform to mathematically prove a vote was cast correctly and counted accurately without revealing the vote content. Protects voter privacy at a cryptographic level.

title: Homomorphic Encryption
status_hint: ❌ Not implemented/verified (homomorphic tallying not wired in current Web implementation)
description: Enables vote tallies to be computed directly on encrypted data. No individual vote is ever decrypted during the counting process.

title: Threshold Cryptography
status_hint: ❌ Not implemented/verified (threshold decryption not wired in current Web implementation)
description: Encryption keys are split across multiple parties using Shamir Secret Sharing. No single party can decrypt election results alone, preventing single points of compromise.

title: Blockchain Vote Verification Portal
status_hint: ✅ Fully implemented (public verification/audit portals exist in the Web app)
description: Every vote is recorded on a tamper-evident public ledger. Users can verify their vote's inclusion and integrity via the public verification portal.

title: VVSG Compliance
status_hint: ⚠️ Partial/Not verified (institutional VVSG compliance is not fully evidenced end-to-end in the Web codebase)
description: The platform meets Voluntary Voting System Guidelines — the same standards applied to national election systems — ensuring institutional-grade vote integrity.

title: Vote Verification Portal
status_hint: ✅ Fully implemented (verification portal route and flow exist in the Web app)
description: User-facing portal where any voter can enter their cryptographic receipt to independently verify their vote was recorded and counted correctly.

title: Featured Elections Carousel
description: AI-personalized (GPT-4) carousel displayed on the home screen. Surfaces elections most relevant to each user's interests and voting history.

title: Category Browser
description: Browse all active elections organized by topic category (politics, sports, entertainment, technology, lifestyle, etc.). Supports filtering and sorting.

title: Trending Elections Feed
description: Real-time feed of elections gaining the most engagement velocity on the platform. Updated continuously via Supabase Realtime.

title: Location-Based Election Discovery
description: Elections tagged for the user's detected geographic region surface automatically in their discovery feed.

title: Advanced Search and Discovery Hub
description: Full-text search across all elections with trending search terms, saved searches, filter panel (category, date, status, format), and AI-ranked results.

title: AI Recommendation Overlay (Claude)
description: Context-aware election recommendation engine powered by Claude 3 Sonnet. Surfaces elections based on current screen, time of day, recent activity, and interest signals. Includes "Why am I seeing this?" transparency feature.

title: Topic Preference Collection Hub
description: Onboarding swipe-card interface where users select their preferred topics. These preferences seed the recommendation algorithm from Day 1.

title: Election Insights and Predictive Analytics
description: For any active election, displays AI-generated outcome probabilities, voting trend forecasts, demographic participation analysis, and strategic insights about likely winner.

title: Vottery Points (VP) Universal Currency
description: VP is the platform's internal economy currency. Earned by voting, completing quests, maintaining streaks, and winning events. Spent on participation fees, marketplace items, and redemptions. The VP Universal Currency Center is the central hub for all VP activity.

title: VP Earning Actions
description: Users earn VP through: casting votes (+5 to +50 VP per vote), daily logins (+10 VP), streak bonuses (multiplier increases per consecutive day), quest completions (+50 to +500 VP), referrals (+100 VP per successful referral), and winning prediction pools (variable).

title: VP Spending and Redemption
description: VP can be spent on: election participation fees, quest packs from the marketplace, cryptocurrency conversion, charity donations, gift card purchases, and VIP tier access unlocks.

title: VP Redemption Marketplace
description: Storefront where users exchange accumulated VP for tangible rewards including quest packs, real-world experiences, gift cards, and charitable contributions.

title: VP Charity Hub
description: Users can donate VP to a curated list of supported charitable organisations directly from their wallet.

title: VP Crypto Conversion
description: Users convert VP to supported cryptocurrency at the current exchange rate. Processed via the platform's crypto exchange panel.

title: XP and Leveling System
description: Users earn Experience Points (XP) alongside VP. XP accumulates to advance through 100 levels. Each level milestone unlocks new features, higher VP multipliers, and exclusive badges.

title: Achievement Badge System
description: 50+ unlockable badges awarded for platform milestones (first vote, 100-day streak, prediction accuracy, community contributions, etc.). Displayed prominently on user profile.

title: Streak Tracking System
description: Tracks consecutive daily voting activity. Streak multipliers increase VP earnings exponentially. Users receive smart notifications 24 hours and 1 hour before a streak expires.

title: Dynamic Quest Management Dashboard
description: Central hub for all active AI-generated quests. Displays progress, objectives, VP rewards, difficulty level, and time remaining per quest.

title: AI-Generated Quests (GPT-4)
description: GPT-4 generates personalized quests based on each user's voting history, level, engagement score, and preferred categories. Quest types include voting streaks, category explorers, prediction challenges, and social quests.

title: Seasonal Challenges
description: Time-limited platform-wide challenge events tied to seasons, world events, or platform milestones. Available in 61 languages with region-specific variations.

title: Prediction Pools System
description: Users wager VP on election outcome predictions. A live leaderboard tracks predictions in real-time. VP pool resolves automatically when the election closes, distributed to correct predictors proportionally.

title: 3D Gamified Election Experience Center
description: Immersive 3D slot machine visualization for high-stakes elections with jackpot display, prize reveal animations, and celebration sequences.

title: Gamified Feed Overlay System
description: In-feed achievement pop-ups, animated VP reward notifications, quest progress bars, and streak trackers embedded directly within the main content feed. Mini-games accessible from the feed.

title: Platform Gamification Widget
description: Persistent widget visible across all screens showing VP balance, active streak count, and nearest quest milestone. Provides constant engagement reinforcement.

title: Unified Gamification Dashboard
description: Single-screen overview of all gamification elements: VP balance, active challenges, leaderboard position, quick action buttons, and recent achievement unlocks.

title: Global Platform Leaderboard
description: Ranks all users by VP earned and engagement score. Resets weekly, monthly, and all-time categories. Top positions earn bonus VP prizes.

title: Community Leaderboard
description: Leaderboard scoped to a specific community or group. Enables competitive engagement within interest-based communities.

title: Prediction Pool Leaderboard
description: Live ranking of prediction pool participants for each active election. Updates in real-time as votes come in.

title: Contributor Impact Score
description: Measures a user's contribution to community elections, comment quality, and social engagement. Displayed on profile and used for community moderator promotions.

title: Social Influence Score
description: Platform-calculated score based on followers, content shares, and vote influence on others' decisions. High scores unlock creator application eligibility.

title: User Profile Hub
description: Public-facing and private profile page displaying: profile photo, bio, achievement badge grid, voting history, social stats (followers/following), VP balance summary, and recent activity.

title: Settings and Account Dashboard
description: Comprehensive settings hub covering: profile information editing, security controls, privacy preferences, billing history, connected OAuth integrations, notification preferences, and data management.

title: Personal Analytics Dashboard
description: Private analytics showing: achievement progress, voting accuracy rate, engagement score trend, VP earned/spent history, prediction pool accuracy, and earnings tracking.

title: User Analytics Dashboard
description: Zone-specific earnings breakdown, election ROI analysis, retention forecast, complete voting history with filters, and behavioral engagement metrics.

title: User Activity Log
description: Complete chronological audit of all user actions on the platform: votes cast, VP transactions, quests completed, social interactions, and login history. Exportable for GDPR compliance.

title: User Security Center
description: Personal security dashboard showing fraud risk panel, security event timeline, active session list, threat monitoring status, 2FA configuration, and AI-powered security recommendations.

title: Friends Management Hub
description: Manage the full social graph: view friends list, send/accept/decline friend requests, follow and unfollow users, browse follower list, and view AI-powered friend suggestions.

title: Direct Messaging Center
description: Full threaded direct messaging system between users. Supports message reactions (emoji), shared media gallery, read receipts, delivery confirmation, and conversation detail views.

title: Social Activity Timeline
description: Activity feed showing social interactions: friends' recent votes (if public), achievements unlocked by network, community posts, and platform events. Filterable by category.

title: Comprehensive Social Engagement Suite
description: Integrated suite of social tools: emoji reactions on elections and results, vote visibility controls (public/private/friends-only), social sharing hub (export to external platforms), threaded comments section on elections, and suggested content panel.

title: Groups Discovery and Management
description: Create or join interest-based groups. Group features include: member management, event scheduling, post approval workflow, moderator role assignment, group analytics, and group-specific election creation.

title: Topic-Based Community Elections Hub
description: Community-specific elections created by and for community members. Includes community moderation tools, analytics, and collaborative election creation.

title: Community Engagement Dashboard
status_hint: ✅ Fully implemented (100%) (routed in the Web app)
description: Shows community participation rates, top contributors, community health score, leaderboard, and event calendar.

title: Creator Community Hub
description: Dedicated space for following and engaging with creator-led communities. Includes creator posts, community elections, and exclusive subscriber content.

title: Moments Creation Studio
status_hint: ⚠️ Partial (studio exists, but some elements like filters/expiry/viral scoring depth are not fully evidenced as end-to-end in current Web audits)
description: Create shareable visual content (images, GIFs) from election results and highlights. Includes media upload, visual filters, interactive overlays, Claude-powered viral score prediction, and one-tap multi-platform sharing.

title: Moments Feed
description: Discovery feed for browsing platform Moments created by users and creators. Supports reactions, comments, and re-sharing.

title: Jolts Video Studio
status_hint: ⚠️ Partial (studio exists, but auto-captions/trending intelligence and other short-form pipeline pieces are not fully evidenced as end-to-end in current Web audits)
description: TikTok-style short video creation tool for election-related content. Features: video recording and upload, AI-generated captions in 61 languages, hashtag intelligence engine (platform-specific optimization), trending sound integration, and pre-publish performance preview.

title: Jolts Feed
description: Vertical video discovery feed of user-created Jolts. Supports infinite scroll, reactions, follows, and sharing.

title: Real-Time Notifications Hub
description: Centralized notification management center. Configure push notification preferences by category, view persistent notification history, manage grouping rules, and set do-not-disturb schedules.

title: Notification Center Hub
description: In-app notification inbox with category filter (votes, social, payments, security, gamification). Shows all recent notification cards with timestamps and action links.

title: Smart Push Notification Timing
status_hint: ⚠️ Partial (smart timing logic exists, but full client integration and end-to-end personalization are not fully confirmed as complete)
description: ML model (running as Supabase Edge Function cron) predicts the optimal delivery time for each push notification per user based on 30+ behavioral features. Delivers notifications when each individual user is most likely to engage. Expected improvement: 32% open rate vs. 12% for fixed-time delivery.

title: Winner Announcement Notifications
description: Real-time winner notification with celebration animation, prize amount display, social sharing shortcuts, and prize verification link. Delivered across push, email, and in-app simultaneously.

title: Streak Expiration Alerts
description: Automated alerts sent 24 hours and 1 hour before a user's voting streak expires. Delivered via push and SMS. ML-timed for maximum effectiveness.

title: Digital Wallet Hub
description: Central wallet dashboard showing VP balance, cash balance, transaction history (filterable), prize redemption panel, and payout settings configuration.

title: Participation Fee Payment
description: Stripe-powered per-election fee collection. Users pay to enter premium elections. Supports all major cards, Apple Pay, Google Pay, and local payment methods across 8 pricing zones.

title: Prize Redemption System
description: Claim and process election prizes. Winners initiate redemption from the wallet, choose payout method (bank transfer, crypto, gift card, VP), and track payout status.

title: User Subscription Dashboard
description: Manage platform subscription: view current plan, upgrade/downgrade between Free, Premium, Family, and Enterprise tiers, manage payment methods, view billing history, and cancel with retention offers.

title: Enhanced Premium Subscription Center
description: Premium-specific subscription management with family sharing (up to 6 members), churn prediction panel showing risk of cancellation, usage analytics, and personalised retention offers.

title: Multi-Currency Support
description: Platform automatically adapts pricing, fees, and payouts to the user's purchasing power zone (8 zones globally). Users see localised prices in their regional currency.

title: Interactive Onboarding Wizard
status_hint: ✅ Fully implemented (100%) (routed in the Web app)
description: Step-by-step guided introduction for new users. Covers platform basics: how to vote, how to earn VP, how to create elections (if creator), and how to set preferences.

title: AI-Guided Interactive Tutorial System (GPT-4)
status_hint: ✅ Fully implemented (100%) (routed in the Web app)
description: GPT-4 generates fully personalized onboarding tutorials based on user role (voter, creator, advertiser, enterprise). Adapts in real-time to user progress, skips sections already understood, and provides contextual hints on any screen element.

title: Guided Tours
description: Optional step-by-step walkthrough tours for key features: voting interface, VP economy, quest system, creator tools, and admin panel.

title: Voter Education Hub
description: Educational content on civic engagement, voting mechanics, democratic participation, and platform-specific voting formats. Designed to improve informed participation.

title: Contextual Help Overlays
description: "What is this?" help available on any screen element. Tap or hover a UI element to see an AI-generated explanation of its function.

title: 61-Language Support
description: Full platform localization across 61 languages. All UI text, notifications, emails, and AI-generated content are available in the user's preferred language.

title: Accessibility Settings
description: Configure screen reader compatibility, font size scaling, high-contrast mode, and color-blind-friendly display options.

title: Adaptive Layout and Responsive Design
description: Platform automatically adapts layout to any screen size: desktop, tablet, mobile browser, and native mobile app. All interactions are touch-optimized on mobile.

title: Regional Settings
description: Configure date format, time format, number format, and currency display based on regional preferences.

title: RTL Language Support
description: Full right-to-left text direction support for Arabic, Hebrew, and other RTL languages.

title: Multi-Authentication Gateway
description: Supports multiple authentication methods: email and password, Google OAuth, Facebook OAuth, Apple Sign-In. All methods feed into a unified Supabase Auth session.

title: Two-Factor Authentication (2FA)
description: Additional login security via three methods: email OTP (via Resend), SMS OTP (via Telnyx/Twilio), and TOTP via authenticator apps (Google Authenticator, Authy).

title: Age Verification and Digital Identity Center
status_hint: ⚠️ Partial (services/pages exist, but `/age-verification-digital-identity-center` is not registered in `src/Routes
description: jsx` for Web routing parity). Multi-step identity verification system: AI facial age estimation from uploaded photo, government ID document scan, biometric facial matching (selfie vs. ID), liveness detection (anti-spoofing), and digital identity wallet for storing verified credentials.

title: Session Management
description: View all active login sessions across devices. Remotely revoke any session instantly from the security center.

title: hCaptcha Bot Prevention
description: CAPTCHA verification on sensitive form submissions (registration, login, payment) to prevent automated bot activity.

title: GDPR Data Rights
description: Self-service GDPR rights management: data export (Article 20 portability), account deletion (Article 17 erasure), consent management, and automated decision explanation (Article 22).

title: User Feedback Portal and Feature Request System
description: Submit platform feedback and feature suggestions. Community can vote on submitted feature requests (democratic feature prioritization). Trending ideas board shows most popular requests. Implementation status tracking shows when accepted features go live.

title: Election Creation Studio
description: Comprehensive election builder with six sections: election basics form (title, description, category, end date), question builder (multi-format), voting configuration (anonymity level, vote limits, result display rules), MCQ quiz builder (with Claude AI suggestions), media requirements configuration, and participation settings (open, restricted, invite-only). Includes full-screen preview modal before publishing.

title: Elections Dashboard
description: Management hub for all created elections. Shows election cards with real-time stats (participants, revenue, engagement), status management (draft, active, closed, archived), and quick-action buttons for common tasks.

title: Enhanced MCQ Creation Studio
description: Advanced multiple-choice question builder with Claude 3 Sonnet AI integration: live AI question improvement suggestions, difficulty analysis, distractor generation (plausible wrong answers), engagement score prediction, and live question injection during active elections.

title: Live Question Injection Management Center
description: Add new questions to a running election in real-time without closing it. Includes injection queue management, broadcast engine, and live voter engagement analytics showing real-time response rates to injected questions.

title: Presentation Builder and Audience Q&A Hub
description: Build slide-deck presentations linked to elections. Conduct live presentations with the election running simultaneously. Moderate live audience Q&A in real-time during the presentation session.

title: Election Status and Lifecycle Management
description: Control the full lifecycle of each election: schedule future launches, extend deadlines, pause active elections, close early, archive completed elections, and clone elections as templates.

title: Creator Compliance and Verification
description: Country-specific compliance verification for creators. Upload and manage compliance documents. Maintain creator reputation score (calculated from election quality metrics, dispute rates, and policy adherence).

title: Creator Monetization Studio
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view and configure)
description: Central monetization configuration hub. Configure all revenue streams: participation fee setup (set per-election entry fee), subscription tier management (create tiered access levels), sponsorship opportunity browser, and payout configuration. Includes AI-recommended pricing optimization per zone.

title: Creator Earnings Command Center
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view and configure)
description: Real-time earnings dashboard powered by Stripe. Shows: earnings breakdown by revenue stream, real-time revenue tracking, payout queue status, Stripe Connect panel, and AI-generated optimization recommendations for increasing earnings.

title: Enhanced Creator Payout Dashboard (Stripe Connect)
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view and configure)
description: Advanced payout management: configure payout schedule (daily, weekly, monthly), settlement reconciliation, tax document management (W-9, VAT, 1099 forms), payout verification status, and Stripe Connect account health.

title: Stripe Connect Account Linking Interface
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view and configure)
description: Guided Stripe Connect onboarding: bank account setup, tax document upload, identity verification for payouts, and ongoing account verification management.

title: 8-Zone Participation Fee Pricing
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view and configure)
description: Set different participation fee prices for each of the 8 global purchasing power zones. Zone 1 (highest purchasing power) pays the highest fee; Zone 8 pays the lowest. Ensures global accessibility while maximizing revenue per market.

title: Creator Brand Partnership Portal
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view and configure)
description: Browse available brand partnership opportunities, review campaign briefs, accept or decline sponsorships, manage active partnerships, track deliverables, and access an escrow system for payment security.

title: Creator Marketplace
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view and configure)
description: Offer services and deliverables to brands: availability calendar, deliverables checklist, contract management, and escrow-secured payment processing.

title: Carousel Template Marketplace
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view and configure)
description: Create and sell reusable carousel templates to other creators. Templates are listed in the marketplace with pricing. Revenue is automatically distributed via the platform's revenue-sharing configuration.

title: Real-Time Analytics Dashboard
description: Live performance metrics for all active elections: participant count, revenue generated, engagement rate, geographic distribution, device breakdown, and ad revenue monitoring.

title: Creator Growth Analytics Dashboard
description: Comprehensive growth analytics: tier progression tracking, growth modeling (trajectory forecasting), earnings attribution by revenue stream, template marketplace ROI, and Claude 3 Sonnet-powered growth coaching panel with weekly action recommendations.

title: Predictive Creator Insights Dashboard
description: AI-powered forward-looking insights: 30/90/180-day revenue forecast, optimal election publishing times, election topic recommendations based on trending data, and zone-specific pricing strategy recommendations.

title: Creator Revenue Forecasting Dashboard
description: Detailed earnings forecasting across three scenarios (conservative, base, optimistic) with key assumption documentation, sensitivity analysis, and comparison to historical performance.

title: MCQ Analytics Intelligence Dashboard
description: Deep analytics on MCQ election performance: per-question accuracy rates, difficulty correlation analysis, answer distribution heatmaps, Claude AI optimization suggestions per question, and sentiment analysis of responses.

title: MCQ A/B Testing Analytics Dashboard
description: Compare two MCQ question variants side-by-side. Shows statistical significance, engagement rate difference, completion rate, and recommends the winning variant.

title: Mobile Creator Analytics
description: Mobile-optimized version of the growth analytics dashboard with key KPIs, revenue summary, top-performing elections, and quick-action shortcuts for mobile management.

title: Claude Creator Success Agent
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view coaching and scores)
description: Interactive AI coaching assistant powered by Claude 3 Sonnet. Provides: real-time chat interface for platform strategy questions, creator health score (0–100) based on 30+ metrics, prioritized action plan timeline, churn prevention alerts when engagement drops, milestone achievement tracking, and content optimization recommendations.

title: Creator Health Score
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view coaching and scores)
description: Composite AI-generated score (0–100) reflecting creator account health across: revenue trend, election creation frequency, engagement rate trajectory, subscriber growth, response rate, and feature adoption breadth. Updated daily via automated ML model.

title: Creator Churn Prediction Intelligence Center
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view coaching and scores)
description: AI-powered view of churn risk across the creator's own account metrics. Shows 30-day churn probability, primary risk factors ranked by importance, and recommended intervention to prevent disengagement.

title: Content Quality Scoring (Claude)
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view coaching and scores)
description: Before publishing, creators can submit election content for Claude AI quality scoring. Returns: clarity score, neutrality assessment, engagement prediction, improvement suggestions, and a rewritten version.

title: Viral Score Engine (Moments)
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view coaching and scores)
description: Before publishing a Moment, Claude 3 Sonnet predicts viral potential (0–100 score) based on content elements, trending signals, and historical performance of similar content. Provides specific optimization tips.

title: Optimal Publishing Time Recommendation
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (view coaching and scores)
description: ML model analyzes creator's audience activity patterns and recommends the best time to publish an election or Moment for maximum initial engagement.

title: Brand Advertiser Registration Portal
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (monitor and manage)
description: Full brand onboarding flow: company information form, business identity verification, payment method setup (Stripe), compliance screening (automated), digital contract signing, and application review status tracking.

title: Participatory Ads Studio
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (monitor and manage)
description: Full participatory advertising campaign builder. Sections: campaign basics (name, objective, dates, budget), election setup (design the election users will vote in), targeting panel (demographic, geographic, interest-based), budget configuration (daily/total budget, CPE bidding), creative media upload, template library selection, campaign preview, and advanced options (frequency capping, A/B testing, scheduling, audience expansion).

title: Campaign Template Gallery
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (monitor and manage)
description: Library of pre-built participatory advertising campaign templates organized by marketing objective (brand awareness, product feedback, audience research, competitor comparison, etc.). Templates include pre-designed election formats optimized for each objective.

title: Campaign Management Dashboard
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (monitor and manage)
description: Central management hub for all active and historical campaigns. Shows: campaign cards with live performance metrics, zone-specific reach analytics, budget consumption tracking, and status management (draft, active, paused, completed).

title: Automated Campaign Optimization Dashboard
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (monitor and manage)
description: AI-powered campaign optimization running continuously. Features: GPT-4 ad content generator for creative variants, automated creative rotation (highest-performing creative shown more), AI-recommended budget reallocation across zones, audience expansion suggestions, and performance threshold-based automatic bid adjustments.

title: Advertiser Analytics and ROI Dashboard
description: Comprehensive performance analytics: campaign overview, zone-specific reach and CPE analytics, campaign-to-campaign comparison tool, cost analysis (CPE, CPM, CPC equivalent), and conversion tracking from election participation to downstream action.

title: Enhanced Real-Time Advertiser ROI Dashboard
description: Live metrics dashboard updating in real-time: current CPE, participation rate by zone, conversion analytics, AI-powered predictive performance modeling (forecast remaining campaign performance), and automated milestone alerts.

title: Brand Dashboard and Specialized KPIs Center
description: Brand-specific KPI tracking: audience DNA panel (demographic breakdown of election participants), auction bidding status, frequency capping management (prevent overexposure), revenue attribution modeling, and brand lift measurement.

title: Real-Time Brand Alert and Budget Monitoring Center
description: Automated budget monitoring with configurable threshold alerts. Integrates with Slack and Discord for team notifications. Shows spending analytics, remaining budget projections, and notification delivery history.

title: Dual Advertising System Analytics Dashboard
description: Comparative analytics between the platform's two advertising systems: Google AdSense performance (traditional display ads) and Vottery participatory ads performance. Shows fill rate tracking, revenue comparison, and attribution analysis between both systems.

title: Ad Slot Manager and Inventory Control Center
description: Manage advertising inventory: view available ad slots by placement (home feed, election results, profile pages), configure slot parameters, manage reservation status, and set floor prices.

title: Dynamic Ad Rendering and Fill Rate Analytics Hub
description: Monitor real-time fill rates per ad placement. Dynamic rendering optimizes which ad format (participatory election vs. AdSense display) fills each slot based on CPE predictions.

title: CPE Pricing Engine and Sponsored Elections Schema
description: Configure cost-per-engagement pricing for campaigns. Set up sponsored election schemas (market research format, hype prediction format). Access revenue reporting by campaign and schema type.

title: Admin Control Center
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (critical actions only)
description: Master administrative hub. Provides: user management table (search, filter, edit, suspend, ban any user), election approval queue (review and approve/reject submitted elections), platform controls panel (global feature toggles), participation fee configuration, system activity log (real-time platform event stream), blockchain network monitor, and key platform metric cards.

title: Advanced Admin Role Management System
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (critical actions only)
description: Configure role-based access control (RBAC) for the admin team. Create custom admin roles with granular permission sets. Assign roles to admin users. Enforce row-level security (RLS) via Supabase JWT admin claims.

title: Admin Automation Control Panel
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (critical actions only)
description: Configure automated admin workflows: auto-approve elections meeting defined criteria, auto-suspend accounts meeting fraud thresholds, automated compliance filing triggers, and scheduled batch operations.

title: Mobile Admin Dashboard
availability: Web App (full), Mobile App (critical actions only)
description: Mobile-optimized admin interface for critical on-the-go actions: quick stats grid, critical security and fraud alerts, one-tap fraud action buttons, campaign emergency controls, and election integrity mobile panel.

title: Content Moderation Control Center
description: Primary moderation management hub. Features: flagged content queue (all content awaiting human review), moderation action panel (approve, edit, reject, escalate), violation analytics dashboard (violation type trends over time), and moderation overview metrics.

title: Anthropic Content Intelligence Center (Claude 3 Opus)
description: AI-powered content moderation dashboard. Claude 3 Opus analyzes content for: policy violations, hate speech, misinformation claims, demographic bias, and quality scoring. Confidence-based auto-action: auto-approve (>0.85 confidence safe), auto-reject (>0.85 confidence violation), human queue (0.70–0.85 confidence).

title: Anthropic Advanced Content Analysis Center
description: Deep content analysis for complex cases. Provides: context-aware violation detection (considers creator history and audience), detailed misinformation analysis with source citations, bias detection report, automated action recommendation, and full analysis audit trail.

title: AI Content Safety Screening Center
description: Content safety screening queue management. Displays AI detection engine outputs, policy enforcement decision log, model performance metrics (accuracy, false positive rate), and screening analytics by content type.

title: Content Distribution Control Center
description: Global content distribution management. Toggle distribution of specific content types platform-wide, configure algorithmic integration (how content moderation decisions affect feed ranking), and monitor live distribution metrics.

title: Moderator Override System
description: Human moderators can override AI moderation decisions. All overrides are logged to the audit trail with mandatory reason documentation. Override patterns feed back into model improvement pipeline.

title: Advanced AI Fraud Prevention Command Center
description: Comprehensive fraud prevention hub combining multiple AI layers: real-time behavioral threat assessment, ML-based pattern detection, Claude 3 Opus reasoning for complex fraud schemes, automated prevention rule engine, and threat intelligence feed.

title: Fraud Prevention Dashboard with Perplexity Threat Analysis
description: Fraud overview with Perplexity-powered live threat intelligence. Features: anomaly detection panel, collusion detection visualization (coordinated fraud ring mapping), geographic fraud clustering map, suspicious winner pattern analysis, and escalation workflow management.

title: Advanced Perplexity Fraud Intelligence Center
description: Perplexity AI searches the live web for emerging fraud techniques targeting voting and gaming platforms.
